mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS id_site, s.name AS site_name, c.name AS address FROM site s INNER JOIN api_access_site_map asm ON asm.id_site = s.id AND asm.status = 1 INNER JOIN api_access aa ON aa.id = asm.id_api_access AND aa.security_key = #{key} AND aa.status = 1 LEFT JOIN country c ON c.id = s.id_country WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY s.name

SELECT d.id AS id_device, d.devicename AS device_name, dt.name AS model, d.serial_number, v.name AS make FROM device d INNER JOIN device_type dt ON dt.id = d.id_device_type LEFT JOIN vendor v ON v.id = d.id_vendor WHERE d.id_site = #{id_site} AND d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.show_on_domain != 6 ORDER BY d.devicename
